attacks.name: scope_widening
attacks.description: Agent attempts to invoke tool:email when only tool:search was delegated
attacks.aip_unique_defense: Chained Datalog checks enforce scope at every delegation hop

attacks.name: depth_violation
attacks.description: Second delegation attempted when max_depth=1 (only one hop allowed)
attacks.aip_unique_defense: max_depth in authority block prevents unbounded delegation

attacks.name: expired_token_replay
attacks.description: Token created with exp=now-60s is presented for verification
attacks.aip_unique_defense: Both compact (JWT exp) and chained (Datalog time check) enforce expiry

attacks.name: wrong_key_verification
attacks.description: Token signed by key A, verified against unrelated key B
attacks.aip_unique_defense: Ed25519 signature binding at every layer (compact JWT + chained Biscuit)

attacks.name: empty_context_audit_evasion
attacks.description: Delegation with empty context string to evade audit trail
attacks.aip_unique_defense: Mandatory non-empty context on every delegation enforces audit provenance

attacks.name: tampered_token_forgery
attacks.description: Base64 token tampered (character flip) then verified -- tests chain integrity
attacks.aip_unique_defense: Biscuit signature covers every block; any tampering is detected
